title: Gardeners' Digest : June
excerpt: Happy Friday! Hope your summer's been going well so far. Life is busy as usual over here. Getting excited about CHA Summer in Chicago. It's coming up quick! The days are flying by. A layout using an old photo of…
body:
Happy Friday! Hope your summer's been going well so far. Life is busy as usual over here. Getting excited about CHA Summer in Chicago. It's coming up quick! The days are flying by.

A layout using an old photo of me and my grandma and new Crate Paper and Studio Calico goodness, machine and hand sewing.

So many of the layouts in the Two Peas in a Bucket gallery.

1. Studio Calico Stepping Stone Alphabet - So versatile and fun to layer. Love stamping the solid with a lighter color and the outline with something more bold.

2. Pebbles paper - Stocking up on several sheets of this - the colors and pattern are perfection.

3. Hey Day 6x6 paper pad - Every single sheet is usable and so lovely, thankful there are 2 of each. Much of this has already shown up in my Project Life and on layouts.

4. So Happy Together 6X6 paper pad - So colorful and fun, great for summer.

5. These alphas. One full sheet in orange and one full sheet (on the back) in light blue. Love these tiny things. Next stop - Lisa.
